headline: Western Digital (WDC) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Volatility And AI Storage Growth Expectations
summary: Why Western Digital is on investors’ radar now Western Digital (WDC) has drawn fresh attention after recent share price swings, with a 4.3% gain over the past day contrasting with declines over the past week and month. That volatility comes against a backdrop of strong past 3 months and 1 year total returns, together with positive annual revenue and net income growth, prompting investors to reassess what they are paying for the company’s US$10.7b revenue base. headline: Western Digital vs Seagate After the Sell-Off: One Storage Rival Is a Clear Winner
summary: Western Digital (NASDAQ: WDC) and Seagate Technology (NASDAQ: STX) both got hit in the March 3, 2026, sell-off as Iran conflict fears rattled semiconductor markets and rippled into U.S. storage names. Both stocks bounced back the following day but are still off their recent peaks. Retirement-focused investors face a direct choice: which one deserves a ...
